name: archive-from-queued-state-resolves
description: Scenario 02 covered archive from state='pushed' (attention-card path). This covers archive from state='queued' — the archive-dashboard / bulk-archive entry point where the row never went through attention. Must still resolve with resolution_method='manual:button'. If a future code path narrows handleArchive to only accept state='pushed', this trips.

db.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND state = 'resolved' AND resolution_method = 'manual:button' AND resolved_at IS NOT NULL
